mapper.select: /* Cart.selectActiveCartByGuestTokenId */ SELECT ID AS id, GUEST_TOKEN_ID AS guestTokenId, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, STATUS AS status, COUPON_CODE AS couponCode, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_CART WHERE GUEST_TOKEN_ID = #{guestTokenId} AND STATUS = 'active' LIMIT 1

/* Cart.selectActiveCartBySocialAccountId */ SELECT ID AS id, GUEST_TOKEN_ID AS guestTokenId, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, STATUS AS status, COUPON_CODE AS couponCode, EXPIRES_AT AS expiresAt, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPT_TM AS uptTm FROM TB_CART WHERE SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND STATUS = 'active' LIMIT 1

/* Cart.selectCartItems */ SELECT CI.ID AS id, CI.CART_ID AS cartId, CI.PRODUCT_DET_ID AS productDetId, CI.QUANTITY AS quantity, CI.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, CI.CURRENCY AS currency, CI.OPTIONS_SNAPSHOT AS optionsSnapshot, CI.CRE_TM AS creTm, CI.UPT_TM AS uptTm, P.ID AS productId, P.PROD_NM AS productName, P.REP_FILE_ID AS productImage, PD.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE AS productDetSize, PD.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR AS productDetColor, PD.SKU_DISCOUNT_RATE AS skuDiscountRate FROM TB_CART_ITEM CI JOIN TB_PRODUCT_DET PD ON PD.ID = CI.PRODUCT_DET_ID JOIN TB_PRODUCT P ON P.ID = PD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE CI.CART_ID = #{cartId} ORDER BY CI.CRE_TM ASC
mapper.insert: /* Cart.insertCart */ INSERT INTO TB_CART ( GUEST_TOKEN_ID, SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, STATUS, COUPON_CODE, EXPIRES_AT, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{guestTokenId}, #{socialAccountId}, 'active', #{couponCode}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW() )

/* Cart.insertCartItem */ INSERT INTO TB_CART_ITEM ( CART_ID, PRODUCT_DET_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, CURRENCY, OPTIONS_SNAPSHOT, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{cartId}, #{productDetId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, COALESCE(#{currency}, 'KRW'), #{optionsSnapshot}::jsonb, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (CART_ID, PRODUCT_DET_ID) DO UPDATE SET QUANTITY = TB_CART_ITEM.QUANTITY + EXCLUDED.QUANTITY, UPT_TM = NOW()
mapper.delete: /* Cart.deleteCartItem */ DELETE FROM TB_CART_ITEM WHERE ID = #{cartItemId}
/* Cart.deleteAllCartItems */ DELETE FROM TB_CART_ITEM WHERE CART_ID = #{cartId}
